_readme: This is the single config file for your BakerData.IO landing page. Edit any value here and the site updates automatically. No touching source code required.

meta.title: BakerData.IO | Fractional Technical Co-Founder
meta.description: Taking startups from idea to revenue. No equity. No long contracts.

hero.label: Who I Am
hero.subheading: Let's take your startup from idea to revenue.

process.label: My Process
process._bgVideoNote: Export your Loom as MP4, place at /public/process-bg.mp4, then set bgVideo below. Leave empty to show the embedded Loom player instead.

steps.title: Diagnose
steps.desc: We review your product, positioning, and target market to identify exactly what's holding you back from your first customers

steps.title: Strategise
steps.desc: You get a clear, actionable roadmap covering your ICP, messaging, and the fastest path to revenue

steps.title: Build
steps.desc: From MVP to scale, I handle the technical execution so you can focus on growing the business

items.quote: Josh has been a dependable and professional asset throughout the development of TierUp, playing an invaluable role in turning the platform into a functional reality.
items.name: Katie Umpleby

items.quote: Josh helped to identify target audience for my mobile app. He has keen eye and insight in SaaS development.
items.name: Ali Nawaz

items.quote: Josh is great at what he does, and is willing to collaborate to get the best results!
items.name: Nathan Lawlor

cta.label: Let's Talk
cta.headline: Ready to build something
cta.subheading: No equity. No long contracts. Fast, focused technical leadership when you need it most.

paths.label: Path A
paths.title: I'm technical in need of growth support
paths.desc: You've built the product. Now you need someone who can bridge the gap between engineering and revenue.

paths.label: Path B
paths.title: I'm marketing oriented in need of technical support
paths.desc: You know your market and your customer. Now you need a technical co-founder to actually build it.

contact.label: Get In Touch
contact.headline: Let's talk.
contact.subheading: Tell me about your startup and I'll be in touch within 24 hours.

technical.label: Technical founder
technical.description: You've built it — now let's grow it.

marketing.label: Marketing founder
marketing.description: You know the market — now let's build it.
